creator: nik@iii.co.uk
text:
I have updated my "make world" tutorial, currently available at

	    http://www.freebsd.org/tutorials/upgrade/upgrade.html

	and placed a GZIPed tarball containing a README file, the 
	make-world.sgml source and a make-world.html converted file in

	    ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/make-world.tar.gz

	The README is also available in that directory as make-world.README.

	Please replace the existing tutorial with this update.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
